reference: I am twenty years old and want to start a family with my boyfriend of four years, as we are ready in our relationship and life to do so. However, we have been having unprotected sexual intercourse since we got together. Not all the time, but I would say seventy-five% of the time, and I have never become pregnant. Do you think that there could be something wrong with one of us?
text: I am twenty years old and want to start a family with my boyfriend of four years, as we are ready in our relationship and life to do so. However, we have been having unprotected sexual intercourse since we got together. Not all the time, but I would say seventy-five percent of the time, and I have never become pregnant. Do you think that there could be something wrong with one of us?
